name: pooh-skills
description: Unified Codex plugin for the Pooh Skills audit fleet.

interface.shortDescription: One Codex plugin for full-fleet repository health audits.
interface.longDescription: Pooh Skills packages the repo-health orchestrator and its 15 audit workers into one repo-local Codex plugin with a single public entrypoint.
defaultPrompt: Use $repo-health-orchestrator to run one full repository health audit.
Use $repo-health-orchestrator to produce one prioritized action queue for this repo.
Use $repo-health-orchestrator to show full-fleet coverage, blockers, and top actions.
